source_name: NREL Residential Efficiency Measures Database (REMDB), machine-readable release 2024-12-23
notes: Installed retrofit cost from REMDB's price regression, evaluated at the midpoint of each metric's valid range (Cooling Capacity = 3.25 Tons; SEER1 = 18.5 Unitless), with retrofit install multiplier 1.5 and adder 0. REMDB data sources: 1, 2, 3, 4, 14. Qualitative rank: Low SS, Medium R2, High Source Diversity. REMDB note: Uses SEER1 coefficient for ASHPs from [14] to have consistent relationship between cost and SEER for ASHPs and Central ACs. Spot checked with [17]. Retail and installation split backed out using assumed 1.5 ratio between installation cost and retail cost, derived from industry insider conversations. Low and High ranges assumed to be +/-30% based on previous REMDB ranges, corroborated with typical RMSE values from LBNL regressions.  Installation subtractor for new construction derived from [2].

measure_name: Air Source Heat Pump — Centrally ducted
source_name: NREL Residential Efficiency Measures Database (REMDB), machine-readable release 2024-12-23
notes: Installed retrofit cost from REMDB's price regression, evaluated at the midpoint of each metric's valid range (Cooling Capacity = 3.25 Tons; SEER1 = 18.9 Unitless), with retrofit install multiplier 1.5 and adder -1384. REMDB data sources: 14. Qualitative rank: Medium SS, High R2, High Source Diversity. REMDB note: Total project costs derived from LBNL database compiled from incentive program data, include many datapoints from California (TECH) and Massachusetts. Costs were divided by locations multipliers to correct for higher or lower labor and material costs. Retail and installation split backed out using assumed 1.5 ratio between installation cost and retail cost (derived from industry insider conversations) although some Mass. program data suggests this ratio may be as high as 2 in some markets. Low and High ranges assumed to be +/-40% based on previous REMDB ranges, corroborated with typical RMSE values from LBNL regressions. Source data variability (e.g., 1.5 times interquartile range) typically exceeds this range in both directions. Subtracted $1384 from retrofit cost to represent cost of new 240v circuit(s), based on the average cost for ASHP projects involving fuel substitution, per LBNL database.  Installation subtractor for new construction derived from [2].
